testcase.name: Admin Dashboard & Management › should display admin dashboard
Admin Dashboard & Management › should prevent non-admin access
Admin Dashboard & Management › should display user management section
Admin Dashboard & Management › should list users with pagination
Admin Dashboard & Management › should allow creating new user
Admin Dashboard & Management › should validate user creation form
Admin Dashboard & Management › should allow editing user role
Admin Dashboard & Management › should allow deactivating user
Admin Dashboard & Management › should display system settings
Admin Dashboard & Management › should allow changing system settings
Admin Dashboard & Management › should display audit logs
Admin Dashboard & Management › should allow filtering audit logs
Admin Dashboard & Management › should export audit logs
Admin Dashboard & Management › should have breadcrumb navigation
Admin Dashboard & Management › should show confirmation before destructive actions
Authentication Flow › should display login page
Authentication Flow › should reject invalid email format
Authentication Flow › should reject weak password
Authentication Flow › should show password strength indicator
Authentication Flow › should mask password input
Authentication Flow › should handle login with valid credentials
Authentication Flow › should show error message for invalid credentials
Authentication Flow › should persist session on page refresh
Authentication Flow › should have secure cookie attributes
Authentication Flow › should handle logout
File Upload & Data Entry › should accept valid image uploads
File Upload & Data Entry › should reject invalid file types
File Upload & Data Entry › should show file size validation
File Upload & Data Entry › should handle drag and drop file upload
File Upload & Data Entry › should clear file selection
File Upload & Data Entry › should validate form fields before submission
File Upload & Data Entry › should show loading state during upload
File Upload & Data Entry › should maintain form data on validation error
File Upload & Data Entry › should show success message after upload
Report Sharing & Access Control › should display share button on report
Report Sharing & Access Control › should open share dialog
Report Sharing & Access Control › should validate recipient email before sharing
Report Sharing & Access Control › should prevent sharing with own email
Report Sharing & Access Control › should generate secure share token
Report Sharing & Access Control › should allow accessing shared report with token
Report Sharing & Access Control › should reject invalid share token
Report Sharing & Access Control › should require password verification for shared access
Report Sharing & Access Control › should expire share token after timeframe
Report Sharing & Access Control › should list active shares
Report Sharing & Access Control › should revoke share access
Report Sharing & Access Control › should display share expiry information
Report Sharing & Access Control › should allow setting share password
Report Viewing & Navigation › should display report list page
Report Viewing & Navigation › should navigate between report sections
Report Viewing & Navigation › should display report data correctly
Report Viewing & Navigation › should have print functionality
Report Viewing & Navigation › should have PDF download functionality
Report Viewing & Navigation › should handle missing report gracefully
Report Viewing & Navigation › should display report metadata
Report Viewing & Navigation › should be responsive on mobile
Report Viewing & Navigation › should have keyboard navigation
Report Viewing & Navigation › should maintain scroll position on navigation
Security & Input Validation › should prevent XSS via form input
Security & Input Validation › should escape HTML in rendered output
Security & Input Validation › should have CSRF token in forms
Security & Input Validation › should validate email format
Security & Input Validation › should enforce password requirements
Security & Input Validation › should trim whitespace from inputs
Security & Input Validation › should prevent SQL injection patterns
Security & Input Validation › should sanitize user-generated content
Security & Input Validation › should enforce file upload restrictions
Security & Input Validation › should have security headers
Security & Input Validation › should enforce same-origin policy
Security & Input Validation › should rate limit form submissions
Security & Input Validation › should not expose sensitive data in DOM
Security & Input Validation › should validate input length restrictions
Security & Input Validation › should use secure authentication method
